---
name: 🚩 Resource Takedown Request
about: For original authors to request the removal of a redesign or fork.
title: '[Takedown]: <Resource Name>'
labels: takedown
assignees: 'Maximus7474'
---

### Resource Takedown Request

**Resource Name:**
[Name of the redesign]

**Listing URL:**
[Link to the page on your site]

**Proof of Identity:**
[Link to your GitHub profile or the original source code repository]

**Reason for Request:**
[Please explain briefly why you want the resource removed]

**Desired Outcome:**
- [ ] Remove listing entirely
- [ ] Mark as "Official Version" (if you've taken over the redesign)
- [ ] Update attribution/links

*Note: We honor all verified author requests. Please allow time for processing.*
